sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7268" key="a)napola/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναπολάζω</orth>, <sense id="n7268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roll about,</tr_> of an engine on shipboard, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:32:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
